basic_details.job_title: J&K Bank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Posts
basic_details.post_name: Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor
basic_details.short_information: Jammu and Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for banking jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.age_details: Zonal Security Officer: Max 62 years. FL Counsellor: Max 65 years.
age_limit.details: Zonal Security Officer: Maximum age limit is 62 years. FL Counsellor: Maximum age limit is 65 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline for Zonal Security Officer. Graduate with experience in Banking/related fields and knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture for FL Counsellor.
qualification.details: Zonal Security Officer: Graduate in any discipline preferably from a recognized University/ Institute. Minimum of three years of experience as Deputy Superintendent of Police or equivalent. FL Counsellor: Graduate with experience in Banking/ related fields and having sound knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture and allied activities. Should have requisite communication and team building skills and the knowledge of local language is essential. Working knowledge of Computers. Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge/skills of having conducted Financial Literacy Camps. Preference will be given to honourably retired J&K Bank Officer not below the rank of Senior Manager (i.e. Scale-III Cadre).

salary_details.pay_scale: Zonal Security Officer: Rs. 45,000/- Per Month. FL Counsellor: Rs. 22,000/- Per Month.

selection_process: Screening of applications based on qualification
experience and suitability. Interview/Interaction to assess knowledge
experience and skill for Zonal Security Officer. Personal interview to assess communication ability
knowledge/skills required for FLC Counsellor in conducting camps
experience in related fields. Demonstration / Presentation to assess teaching skills and communication capability for FL Counsellor.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of J&K Bank to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the J&K Bank recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the J&K Bank recruitment is 04-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in this J&K Bank recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for these posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for J&K Bank recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 500/- (Including GST).

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for Zonal Security Officer?
faq.answer: A Graduate in any discipline is required for the Zonal Security Officer post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for FL Counsellor?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the FL Counsellor post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for a Zonal Security Officer?
faq.answer: The salary for a Zonal Security Officer is Rs. 45,000/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of J&K Bank between the application start and end dates.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the FL Counsellor post?
faq.answer: Yes, a Graduate with experience in Banking/related fields and sound knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture is required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications, followed by an interview/interaction or personal interview and demonstration/presentation.
